wishlist.name: csv-cleaning
wishlist.description: Clean and normalize messy CSV data against a schema
formulations: clean and normalize messy tabular data
dedupe rows and coerce column types in a dataset
handle missing values and standardize a dataframe
sanitize a CSV export into a tidy validated dataset

wishlist.name: xlsx-report-builder
wishlist.description: Generate a formatted XLSX workbook with a chart
formulations: write a styled Excel spreadsheet with formatted cells
build an XLSX report with an embedded chart and summary table
produce an Excel workbook from tabular data using openpyxl
export results to a multi-sheet formatted Excel file

wishlist.name: python-cli-scaffold
wishlist.description: Scaffold a Python CLI with subcommands and help
formulations: scaffold a python command-line tool with subcommands
build a CLI app with argument parsing and help text
create a console entry point for a python package
set up a click-based command line interface
